result.stdout:
LGN / Lagoon CLI tool / version 3.4.0 [dotnet SDK 10.0.201]

Usage: lgn [command] [options]

Options:
  --version            Show version information.
  -?|-h|--help         Show help information.
  -diag|--diagnostics  Enable diagnostic output.

Commands:
  build                Command used to consolidate resources before compilation.
  clean                Delete the folders "bin", "obj" and "_vroot" in all
                       subdirectories
  connect              Connect user to lagoon.desirade.fr.
  cots                 Retrieve application(s) COTS (Commercial Off-The-Shelf).
  cve                  Retrieve application(s) CVE (Common Vulnerabilities and
                       Exposures)
  disconnect           Disconnect user from lagoon.desirade.fr.
  fix-charset          Change the character set of .cs, .razor and Dico.xml
                       files to UTF8.
  install              Install or update additionnal resources (tearser,
                       templates)
  link                 Command used to link the project to the Lagoon sources.
  new                  Command used to create a new Lagoon project
  uninstall            Uninstall additionnal resources (tearser, templates)
  update               Command used to update Lagoon packages versions.

Run 'lgn [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
LGN / Lagoon CLI tool / version 3.4.0 [dotnet SDK 10.0.201]

Command used to consolidate resources before compilation.

Usage: lgn build [options] <Path to .csproj file> <Current project configuration> <Path to Lagoon PreBuild config file>

Arguments:
  Path to .csproj file                 
  Current project configuration        
  Path to Lagoon PreBuild config file  

Options:
  --fw                                 The target framework of the project.
  --js                                 Bundle only the main.min.js file.
  -sw|--service-worker                 Generate service-worker.pubish.js file.
  --obj-path                           Specify the intermediate output path.
  --min-version                        Minimum version expected for this tool.
  --blazor-js                          blazor.webassembly.js source file.
  --patch-load-resource                Patch "loadResource" in
                                       "blazor.webassembly.js".
  --ref-pkg                            Package references used by the project.
  --ref-prj                            Project references used by the project.
  -?|-h|--help                         Show help information.
  -diag|--diagnostics                  Enable diagnostic output.

result.stdout:
LGN / Lagoon CLI tool / version 3.4.0 [dotnet SDK 10.0.201]

Retrieve application(s) COTS (Commercial Off-The-Shelf).

Usage: lgn cots [options] <<PROJECT | SOLUTION | FOLDER>>

Arguments:
  <PROJECT | SOLUTION | FOLDER>            The project, the solution file orr
                                           the path to operate on. If a path is
                                           not specified, the command will scan
                                           from the current directory.

Options:
  --appName <NAME>                         Specify the name of the application.
                                           Otherwise it is retrieved from
                                           appsettings.json or the solution
                                           name.
  --appVersion <VERSION>                   Specify the version of the
                                           application. Otherwise it is retrieve
                                           from the 'Client' project.
  -f|--format <json|csv>                   The output format.
                                           Allowed values are: json, csv.
  -o|--output <FILE>                       The output file name; by default, the
                                           file is created at the root of the
                                           solution.
  --framework <FRAMEWORK | FRAMEWORK\RID>  Chooses a framework (mandatory for
                                           multi-target projects).
  --no-restore                             Do not restore the project before
                                           scanning.
  --no-vulnerabilities                     Do not check for vulnerabilities.
  -?|-h|--help                             Show help information.
  -diag|--diagnostics                      Enable diagnostic output.

result.stdout:
LGN / Lagoon CLI tool / version 3.4.0 [dotnet SDK 10.0.201]

Command used to create a new Lagoon project

Usage:  lgn new [options] <template> <template options>
        lgn new web --name MyApp --title "My Application Title"

Templates:
  web           Lagoon Web application
  web-airbus    Lagoon Web application for Airbus
  web-pf        Lagoon Web application for Pierre-Fabre
  web-tas       Lagoon Web application for Thales

Template options:
  -d|--description <description>    Application description used to initialize the README.md file.
  -n|--name <name>                  The name of the new solution file (<ApplicationName>.sln)
                                    If no name is specified, the name of the output directory is used.
  -t|--title <title>                Title of the application.
  --force                           Forces content to be generated even if it would change existing files.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help             Show help information.
  -diag|--diagnostics      Enable diagnostic output.

result.stdout:
LGN / Lagoon CLI tool / version 3.4.0 [dotnet SDK 10.0.201]

Command used to update Lagoon packages versions.

Usage: lgn update [options] <Path to .csproj file or a folder>

Arguments:
  Path to .csproj file or a folder  

Options:
  -p|--prerelease                   Use beta versions of packages.
  -l|--only-lagoon                  Don't update any packages other than the
                                    Lagoon packages.
  --no-ef                           Do not update Entity Framework Core .NET
                                    Command-line Tools.
  -i|--ignore-lagoon                Don't update any Lagoon packages.
  --no-patch                        Don't apply patchs on projects sources.
  --no-restore                      Do not restore the project before scanning.
  --dotnet-fw                       Update the targeted .NET Framework version
                                    for the application to the latest version
                                    supported by Lagoon.
  --save-version                    The path of the file to where write the
                                    version number applied for the update.
  -?|-h|--help                      Show help information.
  -diag|--diagnostics               Enable diagnostic output.

commands.payload:

  -l|--only-lagoon                  Don't update any packages other than the
                                    Lagoon packages.
  --no-ef                           Do not update Entity Framework Core .NET
                                    Command-line Tools.
  -i|--ignore-lagoon                Don't update any Lagoon packages.

  --no-restore                      Do not restore the project before scanning.
  --dotnet-fw                       Update the targeted .NET Framework version

                                    supported by Lagoon.
  --save-version                    The path of the file to where write the
                                    version number applied for the update.
  -?|-h|--help                      Show help information.
  -diag|--diagnostics               Enable diagnostic output.
